title: Sniffer Update!
description: Adds many new plants for the Sniffer to dig up in various biomes!
body:
**THE MOD IS STILL IN BETA, FEEDBACK IS GREATLY APPRECIATED**

Add extra ancient plants for the Sniffer to dig up in various biomes!

This mod aims to make Sniffers useful, if you were disappointed by the lack of Sniffer content that came in the vanilla game, this is the mod for you! All the new additions and the vanilla plants have their own special uses.

**Additions**:
- **Icelily** - A flower that can be found in snowy biomes, can be used to brew Frostbite potions.
- **Prickly Pear** - A new edible cactus that can be found in deserts (WIP)
- **Frostbite effect** - Mobs with this effect freeze.
- **Enraged effect** - Mobs with this effect become aggressive to everything.

**Changes**:

- Buffed the Sniffer's health significantly
- Torchflowers light up
- Torchflowers can be used to brew Enraged potions
